subcodes.first_line: The clouds of holiness have verily ascended unto this heaven which hath been exalted above all contingent things, and raineth upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سحاب القدس قد ارتفعت بالحق فی هذا السماء التی علت علی الممکنات و تمطر علی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
